title: Pastel Colorful Heart Balloons,10Pcs Rainbow Foil Heart Shaped Balloons,18Inch Pink Blue Yellow Green Purple Helium Balloon for Valentines,Engagement,Birthday,Baby Shower,Wedding Party Decorations
features: 10PCS HEART BALLOONS:You will get 2pcs 18Inch blue heart balloons,2pcs 18Inch yellow heart balloons,2pcs 18Inch pink heart balloons,2pcs green heart balloons,2pcs 18Inch purple heart balloons,ribbon.The rainbow heart shaped balloons suitable for any party, can leave unforgettable memories for the guests attending the party, 18Inch is large enough to better embellish your party.

MATERIAL:Our Aluminium Foil Heart Balloons are made with good quality embossing technology, with neat edges, not easy to explode and leak, non-toxic and odourless, with vibrant colours, ideal for any decoration. Suitable for inflating with helium or air, after filling with helium, pinch the inflation port of the heart balloon to seal it.

EASY TO USE:These helium heart balloons can be filled with air or helium and inflated up to 90% to prevent them from getting too big and exploding. The set comes with a straw and ribbon, after the party is over, use the straw to deflate by inserting it into the inflation port, balloons can be reused

WIDELY APPLICATION:Our colorful heart shaped balloons are great for many occasions including boys and girls, men and women's birthday parties, Easter,Valentine's Day decorations,Mother's Day decorations, Children's Day,baby shower, marriage proposals, bridal shower parties, anniversaries, wedding indoor and outdoor decorations, photo shoot backdrops and other events.

WARM TIPS:Due to batch problems, some of the balloon color may have a slight color difference, is a normal phenomenon, please prevail in kind received. At the same time, please do not over-inflate the polyester film balloon or rub the balloon with sharp objects to avoid balloon explosion.
description: Heart Balloons – 10PCS Elegant Foil Heart Balloons for Party Decorations Description: Key Features: 10PCS Premium Heart Balloons – Includes 2pcs 18Inch blue heart balloons,2pcs 18Inch yellow heart balloons,2pcs 18Inch pink heart balloons,2pcs green heart balloons,2pcs 18Inch purple heart balloons with ribbons. The generous size makes them ideal for eye-catching party decor. High-Quality Material – Crafted from durable polyester film with embossing technology, these balloons are non-toxic, odorless, and resistant to leaks and bursts. Suitable for helium or air inflation, they maintain their elegant appearance throughout your event. Easy to Inflate & Reuse – Simply fill with helium or air (inflate up to 90% capacity to prevent overexpansion). Includes a straw for easy deflation,allowing you to store and reuse the balloons for future celebrations. Versatile for Any Occasion – Perfect for Valentine’s Day, Mother’s Day, birthdays, baby showers, engagements, bridal showers, weddings, anniversaries, and photo backdrops. Ideal for both indoor and outdoor decor. Usage Tips Minor color variations may occur due to different production batches,please refer to the actual product. Avoid over-inflating or contact with sharp objects to extend balloon life. For a floating effect, use helium; for fixed decor, air works perfectly.
